name: ChkCreate_InconsistentTxDLC, ChkStart_InconsistentTxDLC
title: ChkCreate_InconsistentTxDLC, ChkStart_InconsistentTxDLC
description: Checks the DLC of all Tx messages of a node.

The check condition is violated if the DLC of the message does not agree with the DLC specified in the database.Can only be started in the "on start" area of CAPL or during the measurement. However, the check may be set up as early as in the "pre start" area.

parameters.name: aCallback
parameters.description: This parameter must be specified in simulation nodes; it is optional in test modules.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
